headline: YOUR MIA LICENCE, INSPECTION-READY
subheading: A senior QP's playbook to pass MHRA pre-licensing inspection and win your manufacturer's authorisation first time.
flux_prompt: A photorealistic clinical-luxury pharmaceutical scene in a cool teal and cyan palette deepening into deep navy shadows, illuminated by soft natural daylight with a single fresh-green accent glow. The composition looks through a pristine glass wall into a gleaming sterile manufacturing suite: polished stainless-steel process vessels, clean-room piping and immaculate reflective floors recede into shallow-focus bokeh. In the calm foreground, a formally bound site master file dossier rests beside a sleek tablet displaying abstract qualification and batch-release charts, suggesting a quality-assurance vantage point and a regulatory inspection of a mature quality system. Conceptual metaphor of a milestone gateway and verified compliance, authoritative and premium, sterile yet warm, immaculate surfaces, crisp depth of field. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
